message:
chore: bump version to v0.1.64

Includes 20+ commits since v0.1.63:
- fix: switch from Rust nightly to stable toolchain
- fix: Gate daemon module behind #[cfg(unix)] for Windows compatibility
- fix(doctor): detect and recreate missing FTS search table (#17)
- feat(deploy): add direct Cloudflare API upload for Pages deployment
- feat(watch): add stale detection system for watch daemon
- fix(pages): validate cloudflare credentials against target
- feat(pages): add CLI flags for Cloudflare Pages deployment configuration
- fix: use try_from for u32 casts to avoid truncation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.1.63"
+version = "0.1.64"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
